text: Ka dam e, ka lawm e.
Ka lo hmu tawh a ni.
Ka hria chuan thil fel tak a thleng tawh!
meaning: I know that something good has happened!

text: Ka nu leh pa te chu ka lawm takzet.
meaning: I’m very thankful to my parents.

text: Ka dam e, ka lawm e.
Tunlai khawp mai ka lawm e.
Nangmah chu ka hria ve tawp mai.
meaning: I’m really glad to know you.

text: Ka chhiar thei tawh a, ka lawm e.
meaning: I can finally study, I’m happy.

text: Ka thiam tawh a, ka lawm takzet.
meaning: I finally succeeded, I’m so happy.

text: Ka ngaih em em tawh ni e.
Ka hre loh vangin ka ngai tawp mai.
meaning: I miss you because I don’t know where you are.

text: Ka ngaiin ka ring tawh lo.
I sawi zawk leh tawh chu ka ring lo.
meaning: I don’t believe what you keep saying.

text: Nangmah chu a sawi zawk leh tawh e!
Ka ngaih loh vangin ka bo.
meaning: I’m angry because I don’t care.

text: Nang chu ka hlauhawm ta tawh lo.
meaning: I’m no longer afraid of you.

text: Ka lo hmu tawh a ni.
